title: Chaf Exalted
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Chaf Exalted'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=[[Chaf family/Legends|Chaf family]] [[Chiss officer/Legends|officers]][[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Flagship/Legends|Flagship]]{{CSWECite|I|117|Chaf Exalted}} |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |affiliation=*[[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] **[[Chaf family/Legends|Chaf family]] |navy= |fleet=[[Chaf'orm'bintrano's fleet]] |owners= |captains=[[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]] |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Commander, Aristocra Chaf'orm'bintrano of the Fifth Ruling Family is signaling the ''Springhawk''. He demands your immediate presence aboard the ''Chaf Exalted''.|[[Chaf'orm'bintrano's contact]], to Force Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo|}} The '''''Chaf Exalted''''' was a large [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] in service as a [[Flagship/Legends|flaghip]] of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]'s [[Chaf family/Legends|Chaf family]], serving as part of a [[Chaf'orm'bintrano's fleet|fleet]] led by [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]], [[Core name/Legends|core name]] "Formbi." ==Description== A large [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''Chaf Exalted'' had a [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|command bridge]] bigger than the bridge of the [[Cruiser/Legends|Chiss attack cruiser]] [[Springhawk/Legends|''Springhawk'']]. The bridge was manned by [[Color/Legends|yellow]]-[[Chiss family uniform|uniformed]] [[Chaf family/Legends|Fifth Family]] [[Chiss officer/Legends|officers]]. A conference room located aboard the ship featured a narrow desk with a cushioned chair. ==History== {{Quote|You will pay for this. You hear me? You ''will'' pay. And the charge will be high treason.''»
«''I don't think such a charge will hold, Aristocra.''»
«You ''don't think the charge will hold?''»
«''No, I don't. Car'das has already stated that Syndic Mitth'ras'safis and the human Lorana Jinzler were the perpetrators.''»
«''With ''his'' assistance and advice.|translated=1|Aristocra Chaf'orm'bintrano and Admiral Ar'alani, on Force Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo|}} In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. the ''Chaf Exalted'' boarded the ''Springhawk'', an [[Attack cruiser/Legends|attack cruiser]] under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]], [[Core name/Legends|core name]] "Thrawn," of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]] in the aftermath of the [[Battle for Outbound Flight|battle]] for the [[Colony ship/Legends|colony ship]] ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. Thrawn and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ar'alani/Legends|Ar'alani]] of the [[Chiss Defense Fleet]] reported to [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]], core name "Formbi," of the Fifth Ruling Family on the ''Chaf Exalted''{{'s}} bridge, where they were joined by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]]. Thrawn translated while the Aristocra accused the [[Human/Legends|Human]] of bringing weapons to use against the Chiss. Catching on quickly to the power struggle between the Chiss, Doriana claimed salvage rights as a representative of the Republic, distracting the Aristocra long enough for ''Outbound Flight'' to jump to hyperspace. Before it left, a [[Chiss long-range shuttle|shuttle]] carrying the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Jorj Car'das]] launched from the ship. Aboard the ''Chaf Exalted''{{'s}} conference room, Formbi was furious with ''Outbound Flight''{{'s}} escape and confronted Thrawn, Ar'alani, Doriana and Car'das. Records of the battle had shown that Thrawn fired first and he did not believe that the Vagaari's presence had provided sufficient cause to do so. Formbi threatened to revoke Thrawn's [[Military rank/Legends|military position]] in the Expansionary Fleet, as well as [[Rematching/Legends|renounce]] his [[Chiss family/Legends|family]] rank of [[Trial-born/Legends|Trial-born]] in the Eighth Family, never again to rise to a high position where he may threaten Chiss law or custom. Thrawn knew that the Eighth Ruling Family would insist on a hearing at an Eighth Family stronghold and believed that the alien technology that he captured would keep him in the Family. Formbi believed that Thrawn meant the ''Outbound Flight'', but in fact, Thrawn referred to the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projector]], on which Thrawn corrected him. Ar'alani interrupted Thrawn, warning him that the device belonged to the Defense Fleet. Thrawn assured her that if he were to remain an Expansionary Fleet officer, he would present the projector to the Defense Fleet instead. Ar'alani had nothing to say, and knowing that he was defeated, Formbi departed. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Chaf Exalted'' first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']]. ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Chaf Exalted#legends }} [[Category:Flagships]] [[Category:Starships of the Chiss Ascendancy]]
